data.content: Implemented the remaining bulk terminal-state reset bug in the queue multi-select. The Set state select now remounts after apply so shipped, abandoned, or deferred can be applied repeatedly in consecutive bulk actions. Added a focused smoke assertion covering the reset hook-up. Validation in /private/tmp/foolery-62fa-impl-78352: bun run lint passed with existing repo warnings only, bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, and bun run build passed.
